title: Wa70H4000 Top Load With Diamond Drum 7Kg Grey Wa70H4000Sgurt
features:
The Samsung washing machine’s Air Turbo Drying System helps to reduce drying times. It rapidly rotates the washing machine drum to extract more water out of the load, while drawing in more air to speed up the drying process. 
So it minimises the time it takes to get wet clothes or blankets dry.
Keeps your top load washer fresh

For the ultimate in convenience, Eco Tub Clean technology keeps your top load washer fresh without 
using harsh chemicals. And it can even notify you automatically when it needs cleaning.

The Samsung washing machine features an ergonomic and streamline design that looks good and lasts longer. The elegant, natural curves of its round edged design are complemented by the slanted, dual cluster control panel, which makes it easier to use. Especially as its ice blue LED display provides clear information, and a touch of refined beauty. A strong and durable 
tempered glass door also makes it easy to see everything inside.

The Samsung washing machine has a slanted, dual cluster control panel that’s more comfortable 
and intuitive to use. Its ergonomic design, with buttons on both sides, makes it simpler to select 
the right options to program and control your laundry. It’s also angled and located on the front, 
and includes an ice–blue graphic display, so it’s easier to access and see what you’re doing.

The Samsung washing machine features a smooth, round edged design, so it looks extremely elegant and sophisticated. Its beautifully soft and gentle curves are aesthetically pleasing and will blend seamlessly with any modern décor. Even its inges are fully covered and rounded, so they look just as neat and are easy to clean, and there are no sharp corners for clothes or fingers to get caught on.

The Samsung washing machine features a tempered glass door, so it’s easy to see inside, but it will last much longer. It’s designed to withstand a great deal 
of pressure and it is strong against damages and scratches. So it will stay 
looking almost as good as new for a long time.
